name: Hatsuka Suzushiro
description: Hatsuka is a man of small stature with an androgynous physique, having a rather masculine, but very thin, upper body and feminine hips, his head adorned with shoulder-length black hair, and a narrow face. He prefers to dress femininely, which he says is apparently because it suits him better. The clothes he mainly wears are dresses and coats, his footwear consisting of dark calf length boots, smaller shoes and slippers when he is at home.

name: Kiba
description: The (more or less) leader of the "pack", Kiba follows his instincts towards Paradise. When he was young, his pack and family were slaughtered when the forest where he lived was burned to the ground by Jagara's troops. He was then raised by a native who told him that he had a purpose, explaining why the forest spared his life. name: Midori Tokiwa
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") Midori is Tamako's classmate, childhood friend, and baton club member. Her grandparents, whom she lives with, own and run a toy shop in the town's shopping district. Midori feels the need to "take care" of Tamako, so much that she feels she may be in love with her.

name: Nanao Hibiya
description: Hailing from Tourikueisen in the distant country of Yamatsukuni, Nanao is a samurai girl who was offered a second chance at life by Theodore McFarlane. She attends Kimberly at his behest and finds a new purpose in life in crossing blades with [Oliver Horn](https://anilist.co/character/258618/Oliver-Horn). She is a noble and cheerful person who holds honor in high regards, and a good fight even moreso.

name: Tsukiumi

name: Chiya
description: __Height:__ 154cm Chiya is the protagonist of Urara Meirochou. A girl who sometimes appears to have animal-like ears and a tail. She was raised in the woods by her mother's friend, Setsu. Having grown up alongside animals, she is quite agile and has a habit of exposing her stomach when apologizing. She wishes to become an Urara to find her mother.

name: Kikurage
description: Kikurage (named after the Judas' Ear mushroom) is a devil animal who En adopted into his Family because she has the very rare magic of resurrection. As long as a sorcerer's devil tumor is intact, Kikurage can bring them back to life. Kikurage has developed a close bond with another member of the En Family, Ebisu.
